warnings.resolution: selected_concept_id set to 'THUMB_A'. THUMB_A status set to 'selected_pending_design'. All 4 checks (sensationalism, forced_labor_respect, factual_accuracy, creator_value) completed and passed. Resolved in blocker_resolution_round_1.

warnings.message: THUMB_C title overlay '一夜で捨てられた' is factually misleading (departure took 3 months, Jan 15–Apr 20 1974). Must be revised before THUMB_C can be approved.
warnings.resolution: THUMB_C marked status='rejected'. The misleading title_overlay is eliminated from active consideration. Background image IMG020 noted as reusable for a future THUMB_D with accurate title text. COMP-004 resolved. Resolved in blocker_resolution_round_1.

warnings.resolution: All concepts fully checked. THUMB_A: respect_check=true, all 4 sub-checks passed with documentation. THUMB_C: fully checked and rejected on factual_accuracy and sensationalism grounds. No unchecked concepts remain. Resolved in blocker_resolution_round_1.

stage_record.name: fix_m3_timed_readthrough_preparation
stage_record.notes: Simulated timing audit COMPLETE. IMG009 renamed. timed_readthrough_plan.md and timing_plan.json created. Director live read-through still required before voice session.

stage_record.name: vbee_voice_export_package
stage_record.notes: Vbee export package complete. 6 files created in voice/vbee_export/. 28 narration segments. Text sourced from voice.json (FIX-M2 and FIX-M4 applied). 40s Ma beat documented as editor silence (not Vbee). L008 placement at 2:37 and L028 placement at 9:35 documented in segmented script and pause plan. Next action: director live read-through (FIX-M3 gate), then Vbee export session.

stage_record.name: vbee_api_export_automation_setup
stage_record.notes: API automation setup complete. tools/vbee_export_segments.py created. tools/vbee_check_audio_manifest.py created. .env.example created. audio/vbee_raw/ initialized with manifest stub. Credentials loaded from C:/youtubeAI/.env (EXPO_PUBLIC_VBEE_* fallback supported). API not called yet — pending FIX-M3 live read-through gate.

stage_record.name: vbee_callback_payload_fix
stage_record.notes: callbackUrl payload fix applied. Auth test returned 400 (callbackUrl required) — auth was correct, payload was missing required async callback field. VBEE_CALLBACK_URL and VBEE_CALLBACK_FIELD added to config. _build_request() now includes callbackUrl in every payload. Async response handling added: _call_vbee() returns ('audio', bytes) or ('pending', dict). _save_pending_job() writes vbee_pending_jobs.json for async jobs. _require_callback_url() guard added to auth-test and export. print_config() updated to show callback status. production/vbee_callback_payload_fix_report.md created. --auth-test now validates callbackUrl before API call.

stage_record.name: vbee_inputtext_payload_fix
stage_record.notes: inputText field fix applied. Auth test returned 400 (inputText required) — payload used snake_case 'text' but Vbee expects camelCase 'inputText'. All four payload field names made configurable via VBEE_TEXT_FIELD (inputText), VBEE_VOICE_FIELD (voiceCode), VBEE_SPEED_FIELD (speed), VBEE_FORMAT_FIELD (audioType). _build_request() updated. _diagnose_400() added for field-level 400 hints. _FIELD_ENV_MAP lookup table added. print_config() and _print_request_debug() updated to show field names. .env.example updated. production/vbee_inputtext_payload_fix_report.md created.

stage_record.name: vbee_speed_field_fix
stage_record.notes: Speed field fix applied. Auth test returned 400 (speed not allowed) — Vbee rejects speed parameter at /api/v1/tts. speed removed from default payload. VBEE_INCLUDE_SPEED=false added (default). bit_rate also removed (unconfirmed field). _diagnose_400() fixed to parse details array instead of response envelope keys — previous version misidentified status/error_code/error_message as missing payload fields. print_config() updated to show speed exclusion status. production/vbee_speed_field_fix_report.md created.

stage_record.name: vbee_full_export_qa
stage_record.notes: Full export QA complete. 28/28 files present. Total audio: 345.1s. All segments at speed_rate=1 (VBEE_INCLUDE_SPEED=false) — content complete but pacing faster than planned targets. Status: 13 OK, 12 NEEDS_TIMELINE_ADJUSTMENT (extended visual silence), 3 TOO_SHORT (L003/L020/L034 — director listen required). Critical timing: PASS (L008=22.03s at 2:37, L028=20.42s Ma beat chain completes at 10:12 with 7.85s buffer before 10:20). Ma beat 10:20-11:00 intact. Human listening required: L001 L003 L008 L013 L014 L028. Sensitive content review: L013 L014 L015 L016. production/vbee_full_export_qa_report.md and audio/vbee_raw/vbee_full_export_qa.json created.

stage_record.name: vbee_callback_result_url_template_fix
stage_record.notes: URL template fix applied. fetch-result was calling GET /callback-result?request_id=<id> but Vbee requires /tts/{request_id}/callback-result (path substitution). _resolve_result_url() added: replaces {request_id} in URL path (URL-encoded), falls back to query param if absent. Default RESULT_API_URL updated to https://vbee.vn/api/v1/tts/{request_id}/callback-result. error_code 1005 now classified as 'not_found' with actionable hints. 'audio' kind renamed to 'audio_bytes'. print_config() shows result URL template and mode. .env.example updated. production/vbee_callback_result_url_template_fix_report.md created.

stage_record.name: vbee_async_result_fetcher
stage_record.notes: Async result fetcher added. Auth test returned 200 with async job: result.request_id=ab850041, result.status=IN_PROGRESS, result.speed_rate=1. Fixed: _extract_job_id() now searches nested result key. Fixed: _call_vbee() unwraps result wrapper and detects async from IN_PROGRESS. Fixed: _interpret_test_response() shows correct job ID and next step. Added: _find_audio_url() helper (8+ field name variants). Added: _fetch_result(), _fetch_and_save(), run_fetch_pending(), run_fetch_request(), run_auth_test_fetch(), _patch_manifest_after_fetch(). Added CLI: --auth-test-fetch, --fetch-pending, --fetch-request. Added RESULT_API_URL/RESULT_REQUEST_ID_FIELD/RESULT_METHOD config. .env.example updated. production/vbee_async_result_fetcher_report.md created.

stage_record.name: timeline_assembly_plan_v1
stage_record.notes: Timeline Assembly Plan v1 complete. Per-scene audio placement using actual Vbee durations (345.12s total). Timeline math: 345.12s narration + 12s pauses + 40s Ma beat + 322.88s visual silence = 720s exactly. Critical anchors confirmed: L008 at 2:37 (sec=157, spans S007/S008 cut), L028 at 9:35 (sec=575, spans S020/S021 cut). Ma beat 10:20-11:00 (40s, S022) INTACT. 2 image gaps: S010 and S019 have no image assigned (image_id_ref=null in scene.json) — fallback or new generation required before NLE assembly. 5 post-processing jobs: IMG002/IMG004/IMG008/IMG011/IMG016. IMG009 (S011a) requires human producer review. Risk flags: RF-004 and RF-010 (HIGH, image gaps), RF-013 (CRITICAL, Ma beat inviolable), RF-005/RF-006/RF-008 (HIGH, sensitive content). Attribution required: IMG006 CC BY 2.0, IMG020 Japan Govt 1974. Files created: timeline/timeline_assembly_plan.md, data/timeline_assembly_plan.json, production/timeline_assembly_plan_report.md.

stage_record.name: pre_assembly_blocking_fix
stage_record.notes: Pre-assembly blocking fix complete. S010 image gap: IMG003 (wooden door/vines close-up, batch_1) assigned as REUSE_ALTERNATE_CROP — crop to vines/concrete edge, slow_zoom_in motion, cooler grade. 3-minute gap from primary S003 use. S019 image gap: IMG010 (mine rock macro, batch_1) assigned as REUSE_ALTERNATE_CROP — crop to moss/rust mineral surface edges, static hold, +15deg warm color shift. 3:30-minute gap from primary S011b use. No new image generation required. AI% unchanged at 75%. scene.json image_id_ref updated: S010→IMG003, S019→IMG010. image_plan.json dual-use fields added to IMG003 and IMG010. timeline_assembly_plan.json RF-004 and RF-010 resolved. Timeline assembly blocker CLEARED. Files updated: data/scene.json, data/image_plan.json, data/timeline_assembly_plan.json, data/export.json, composition/composition_compliance.json. File created: production/pre_assembly_blocking_fix_report.md.

stage_record.name: rough_assembly_v1_pipeline
stage_record.notes: Rough assembly v1 RENDERED AND VERIFIED. hashima_rough_v1.mp4 at export/rough/ — 720.00s, 63.3 MB, 1920x1080 h264 + AAC 192k. 8/8 verification checks pass: file exists, duration 720.00s (target 720s delta=0.00s), video h264 1920x1080, audio aac 44100Hz 2ch, Ma beat window [620-660s] narration-free, L008 at 157.0s (2:37) delta=0.0s, L028 at 575.0s (9:35) delta=0.0s, 25 scenes. Pipeline: 25 scene clips in render_cache/, video_raw.mp4 concat, audio mix via adelay+apad=whole_dur=720 filter_complex (-/filter_complex file syntax for ffmpeg 7.1.1), final mux AAC. Known rough-cut limitations: MG001-MG004 are drawtext placeholders, no music/ambience, no subtitles, color grades are eq approximations (not LUT). Verification report: production/rough_video_v1_verification_report.md. Scripts: tools/render/render_rough_video.py, tools/render/verify_rough_timeline.py.

stage_record.name: voice_pace_fix_v1
stage_record.notes: Voice Pace Fix v1 (atempo=0.82). DEPRECATED: Human review found 0.82x voice sounds too slow/AI-dragging. Superseded by Stage 42 (atempo=0.90). Files preserved: audio/vbee_slow_082/, data/timeline_assembly_plan_v2.json, timeline/timeline_assembly_plan_v2.md. Do not use for final render. See production/voice_pace_comparison_report.md.

stage_record.name: voice_pace_fix_v2_090
stage_record.notes: Voice Pace Fix v2 (atempo=0.90). AUDIO COMPLETE: 28/28 files in audio/vbee_slow_090/ verified. Actual total: 383.88s (expected 383.47s, delta +0.41s — normal atempo variance, PASS). Ma beat buffer: ~4.54s (comfortable). Manifest: audio/vbee_slow_090/vbee_slow_090_manifest.json. Check report: production/vbee_slow_090_manifest_check_report.md. Next step: python tools/render/render_rough_video.py --timeline data/timeline_assembly_plan_v2_090.json --concat-only

stage_record.name: rough_v3_tight_cut_plan
stage_record.notes: Rough V3 Tight Cut Plan. TARGET: 556s (9:16) vs 720s V2. Narration unchanged (383.88s, 0.90x). Silence: 143.12s (25.7%) vs 284s (39.5%) in V2 — 50% reduction. Ma beat: 17s at 8:22-8:39 (was 40s at 10:20-11:00). L008/L028 anchors REMOVED — fresh layout. Files created: data/timeline_assembly_plan_v3_tight.json, timeline/timeline_assembly_plan_v3_tight.md, production/rough_v3_tight_cut_plan_report.md. Script updates: render_rough_video.py --output flag added, verify_rough_timeline.py --timeline flag + dynamic Ma beat/duration + audio file check. Render: python tools/render/render_rough_video.py --timeline data/timeline_assembly_plan_v3_tight.json --output export/rough/hashima_rough_v3_tight.mp4. Verify: python tools/render/verify_rough_timeline.py --timeline data/timeline_assembly_plan_v3_tight.json --video export/rough/hashima_rough_v3_tight.mp4
